Meeting: fix meetings transcribing nothing when system audio stalls (mixer no longer dams the mic) and warn in-app when the other party's audio isn't coming through
Meeting: request the proper System Audio Recording permission for capturing the other party — Screen Recording is no longer used
Voice typing: record any custom push-to-talk combo from Settings (no extra permission needed)
Voice typing: fix single-key triggers (fn / right-side modifiers) never firing; works with Input Monitoring or Accessibility
Voice typing: auto-paste on release is now the default behavior (clipboard stays the fallback)
Permissions: panel slimmed to meeting essentials; voice-typing permissions are requested by the feature when used; fix stale "not granted" status after granting
